## Added
- **Minecraft 1.21.5 support — Fabric and NeoForge.** Veinminer++ is now available for Minecraft 1.21.5 on both loaders, with full feature parity: connectivity Vein mining; oriented box shapes (3x3x3, plus opt-in 5x5x5 and 9x9x3); opt-in Spread; tool-aware mining with smart ore/tree matching; tree felling with the smart-tree safety net and isolated-canopy leaf cleanup; opt-in "void basic materials"; configurable per-block durability cost; and the see-through shape guide. Configure it in-game (Mod Menu on Fabric, the mods-list Config button on NeoForge).

## Notes
- Requires **Java 21**. The Fabric build needs Fabric API (Mod Menu optional); the NeoForge build needs no extra dependencies.
